step_rationale: Circulating lncRNA elevated in ACS; detects acute myocardial injury.
mechanism: SNHG5 is a circulating long noncoding RNA dysregulated in acute coronary syndromes, enabling early ACS detection.

references.title: Discriminatory power of a circulating multi-noncoding RNA panel in acute coronary syndrome subtypes: Towards precision detection.
references.journal: The international journal of biochemistry & cell biology
